title: DSA in Java
description: A 90-day structured journey learning Data Structures & Algorithms in Java — arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, recursion, sorting and more.

title: QR Code Generator
description: A simple, client-side QR Code Generator. Generates offline-readable QR codes entirely in the browser — no server interaction needed.

title: IoT Air Quality Dashboard
description: Real-time air quality monitoring dashboard powered by ESP8266 sensors and Firebase. Features live data, historical charts and AI-driven analysis.

title: Neon Shooter Pro
description: A browser-based neon-themed shooting game. Move with arrow keys, shoot with spacebar, and rack up the highest score!

title: Percept Backend
description: Python backend service for emotion detection and analysis. Supports multiple emotion classifications for intelligent perception.

title: Resource Hub
description: Personal portfolio and resource-sharing website with project showcases, downloadable files and contact info — all auto-populated from GitHub.
